buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 h-12 rounded-full font-medium shadow-sm active:scale-95 transition-transform
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80 h-12 rounded-full font-medium
buttons.icon: h-10 w-10 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center hover:bg-slate-100

cards.metric: bg-white p-5 rounded-2xl border border-slate-100 shadow-sm flex flex-col justify-between relative overflow-hidden
cards.order: bg-white p-4 rounded-xl border border-slate-100 shadow-sm hover:border-sky-200 transition-colors group relative
cards.stock: bg-slate-900 text-white p-6 rounded-2xl shadow-xl relative overflow-hidden

badges.status_pending: bg-amber-50 text-amber-700 border-amber-100 px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wide
badges.status_delivered: bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-700 border-emerald-100 px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wide
badges.status_cancelled: bg-red-50 text-red-700 border-red-100 px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wide

inputs.base: h-12 rounded-lg border-slate-200 bg-slate-50 focus:bg-white focus:ring-2 focus:ring-sky-100 focus:border-sky-400 transition-all

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: This is a MOBILE-FIRST dashboard. Always test layout on 375px width.
Use 'Manrope' for all headings to give a modern, technical feel.
Implement the 'Bottom Navigation' for mobile views (Dashboard, Orders, Stock, History).
Use the 'Stock Card' as a visual centerpiece - dark mode contrast against the light app.
For the 'Order List', use a 'Card Stack' layout, not a table, on mobile.
WhatsApp Integration: Use a distinct green (#25D366) for any 'Chat' or 'WhatsApp' related actions.
Stock Management: Use a simple +/- stepper interface with large touch targets.
Use 'Sonner' for all toast notifications (e.g., 'Order Assigned', 'Stock Updated').
Data Visualization: Keep it minimal. Use simple progress bars for stock levels. No complex charts on mobile.
Ensure all interactive elements have `data-testid` attributes.
universal_guidelines: Do not use generic centered layouts.
Create depth through layered design elements.
Use glass-morphism effects for sticky headers.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Never use AI assistant Emoji characters.
